backend.changelog: Large-assembly Generate: the post-engage SolidWorks readiness recheck retries instead of aborting while SW is busy, and a blocked run no longer falsely shows Done.

cadBridge.changelog: Auto-dismisses the blocking SolidWorks 'What's Wrong' rebuild-error dialog (now also while the file opens), so an assembly with a rebuild-errored component no longer stalls — and no longer wedges SolidWorks while the dialog waits. The dialog text is logged so you can see which component has errors.
